decks.name: Salesforce Revenue Cloud Consultant
decks.description: Consultant-level certification covering CPQ, Billing, and Subscription Management.

decks.name: Salesforce Certified Platform App Builder
decks.description: Certification covering declarative app development, data modeling, automation, and UI customization on the Salesforce platform.

decks.name: Salesforce Development Lifecycle and Deployment Designer
decks.description: Architect-level certification covering application lifecycle management, deployment strategies, environments, and release management.

decks.name: Salesforce Certified Identity and Access Management Architect
decks.description: Architect-level certification covering SSO, OAuth, SAML, My Domain, and identity management on the Salesforce platform.

decks.name: Salesforce Certified Integration Architect
decks.description: Architect-level certification covering integration patterns, APIs, middleware, security, and data exchange strategies.

decks.name: Salesforce Certified Data Architect
decks.description: Architect-level certification covering data modeling, large data volumes, data migration, master data management, and data governance.

decks.name: Salesforce Certified Sharing and Visibility Architect
decks.description: Architect-level certification covering the security model, record access, sharing mechanisms, and visibility controls on the Salesforce platform.

decks.name: Salesforce Certified Platform Developer II
decks.description: Advanced developer certification covering Apex, process automation and logic, user interface development, testing, debugging, and deployment.
